description_long: This cowshed is a long, rectangular agricultural building with a pitched gable roof covered in dark shingles. The exterior walls are clad in light-colored wooden planks, giving it a rustic yet functional appearance. The structure features three rectangular skylights on the roof, allowing natural light to enter the interior. One side of the building is partially open, supported by wooden posts, providing a sheltered area for livestock or equipment. The opposite side has a large, light blue sliding barn door, which serves as the main entrance. The overall design is practical, with simple lines and minimal ornamentation, suitable for rural or peri-urban environments.
description: A long, wooden cowshed with a dark gable roof, skylights, and a large sliding barn door. One side is open with wooden posts for shelter.
description_view_0: The side view shows the closed wooden wall with three skylights on the roof and an open section supported by wooden posts.
description_view_1: The end view highlights the gable roof and the open, post-supported side, with skylights visible on the roof.
description_view_2: This side view displays the large blue sliding barn door and the full length of the wooden wall beneath the roof.
description_view_3: The opposite end view shows the solid wooden wall and the three skylights on the roof.
attribute_door_style: sliding barn door, wooden, large, painted blue
attribute_window_presence: three rectangular skylights on the roof
